data.body: E0 DONE (commit 3a53e202). Built rebar._cli argparse package: _help (golden text as package data), _init (in-process _ensure_initialized port reusing reads.ensure_fresh for a shared throttle marker), __init__ (router: 19 category-A in-process, category-B transitional passthrough, reconcile preserved). cli.py entrypoint UNCHANGED (no cutover). tests/golden/cli_help/ byte-exact goldens from the live dispatcher; tests/interfaces/test_cli_argparse.py 97 passed (help byte-parity all forms + routing coherence + read/write wiring + stream separation). Full non-integration suite 1652 passed, 0 failed.
